title: GASTAT Saudi Arabia — Consumer Price Index bulletins (latest monthly + annual average)
source_org: General Authority for Statistics (GASTAT), Saudi Arabia
time_coverage: monthly bulletin: May 2026; annual bulletin: full-year 2025 average with historical comparison
units: index numbers and % change, described in file
notes: GASTAT's stats.gov.sa is a heavy client-rendered SPA; no plain HTML/API listing works via curl alone. Found the actual publication catalog by using a browser to reach Statistics > Economic Statistics > Prices Statistics > Consumer Prices Statistics (https://www.stats.gov.sa/statistics?index=119021&subindex=121417), which lists 153 CPI publication entries (all monthly bulletins 2016-2026 plus annual averages) each with a stable Liferay document URL of the form https://www.stats.gov.sa/documents/20117/2435267/<filename>/<doc-uuid>?t=<timestamp>. Files are PDF bulletins (GASTAT does not appear to expose the CPI as a standalone CSV/XLSX on this catalog page — only the narrative PDF report, which does contain full index tables by COICOP division/region). Downloaded the latest monthly (May 2026) and the annual-average 2025 bulletin as representative time-series snapshots; the other 151 monthly PDFs (2016-2026) are available at predictable-pattern URLs on the same page if a longer back-run is wanted later. od.data.gov.sa (Saudi Open Data portal, which lists a 'CPI by commodity and city' CSV dataset) is UNREACHABLE from this environment (curl times out on connect — likely network/geo restriction), so that CSV route was not usable.

failures.attempted: od.data.gov.sa CPI by commodity and city CSV dataset
failures.reason: curl connection timeout (unreachable from this network), 1 attempt
